v0_3_7.title: Campaign ROI Analysis - inline fetch in the component
fixed: After v0.3.5/v0.3.6, the useCampaignROI chunk was still being served with old code (confirmed via React fiber inspection: the component was still using useApi). Inlined the fetch directly into CampaignROISection to force a new module hash on build and eliminate the stuck-cached indirection.

v0_3_6.title: Campaign ROI - hook rewritten with direct fetch
fixed: Rewrote useCampaignROI without the useApi abstraction (whose auto-fetch effect was not firing for this endpoint). Now uses an explicit useEffect and the 'Campaign ROI Analysis' table loads as expected.

v0_3_5.title: 'Campaign ROI Analysis' table now loads campaigns
fixed: Dashboard Marketing's 'Campaign ROI Analysis' section showed 'No campaigns in the selected period' even when campaigns existed. The useCampaignROI hook used a different autoFetch pattern than its sister hooks and never triggered the request. Now loads correctly.

v0_3_4.title: Campaign ROI - second pass
fixed: Removed additional non-existent columns (start_date, end_date) from channel-roi query. The endpoint now only selects columns present in production schema.

v0_3_3.title: Definitive fix - Campaign ROI in Dashboard Marketing
fixed: channel-roi endpoint was selecting a 'description' column from marketing_campaigns that doesn't exist in production - causing 500 and showing 'Create your first campaign' even with campaigns. Now loads correctly.

v0_3_2.title: Dashboard Marketing - Campaign ROI
fixed: Campaign ROI chart now shows existing campaigns (was failing with 500 and asking to create first campaign even when campaigns existed)
channel-roi endpoint error response now includes the underlying error message for easier debugging

v0_3_1.title: Dashboard date filter - custom range
fixed: Dashboard custom date range can now be selected correctly (second-click was not completing the range)
Filter calendar no longer feels cramped - each month now has a minimum width so cells are legible on desktop and mobile
improved: Apply button now also visible and working in the mobile drawer of the date filter
Intermediate selection is previewed locally before committing with Apply

v0_3_0.title: Treatment Improvements and Critical Fixes
added: Save & Add Another button in treatments - add multiple treatments to the same patient without closing the modal
fixed: Dates showing one day earlier than selected
Treatment prices changing on their own over time

v0_2_0.title: Premium Dark Mode and Onboarding System
added: Premium Dark Mode: Complete redesign with modern palette inspired by Notion/Linear
Setup Wizard: Complete step-by-step onboarding system
Auto-cleanup: Automatic detection of phantom data in localStorage
RLS Diagnostics: SQL scripts to verify policy status
Requirements System: Progressive validation of initial setup
improved: Requirement 'service_recipe' now more flexible (allows services without supplies)
Dark mode with better contrast and visual hierarchy
fixed: Missing RLS policies in operational tables
Triggers failing due to missing SECURITY DEFINER
Guard allowing to skip critical onboarding steps
Multiple UX issues in onboarding modal

v0_1_0.title: Initial Release
added: Initial project setup with Next.js 14 + TypeScript
